subject: english
description: 時を表す前置詞（in, on, at, before, after, for）の使い分けを学びます。

questions.question: I play games ___ Sunday.
questions.explanation: 曜日には on を使います

questions.question: I play games ___ the morning.
questions.explanation: morning/afternoon/evening には in を使います

questions.question: I play games ___ 3 o'clock.
questions.explanation: 時刻には at を使います

questions.question: She studies ___ June.
questions.explanation: 月には in を使います

questions.question: I play games ___ two hours.
questions.explanation: 期間（〜の間）には for を使います

questions.question: I play games ___ school.
questions.explanation: 〜の後には after を使います

questions.question: She exercises ___ dinner.
questions.explanation: 〜の前には before を使います

questions.question: I was born ___ 2010.
questions.explanation: 年には in を使います

questions.question: I play games ___ my birthday.
questions.explanation: 特定の日（誕生日・記念日）には on を使います

questions.question: Please finish this ___ tomorrow.
questions.explanation: 〜までに（期限）には by を使います
